name: Google Workspace Duplicate Membership Assignments
description: Detects duplicate Google Workspace group membership rows for the same member and group.
query: SELECT m.group_id, LOWER(TRIM(m.email)) AS member_key, COUNT(*) AS membership_count FROM google_workspace_group_members m WHERE m.group_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(TRIM(m.email), '') != '' GROUP BY m.group_id, LOWER(TRIM(m.email)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Deduplicate repeated membership rows and validate provisioning idempotency in sync pipelines.
